Based on your Sustainability and ESG responses, you are required to report your GHG emissions on a consistent basis. This will provide visibility to your connected Clients to see relevant reporting of Scope 1 and 2 emissions.\n\nPlease report the total MT CO2e for that scope and period in your responses below.  Ensure that your inputs align with either a monthly or quarterly input, based on your GHG reporting frequency.

Please upload any documentation related to your Carbon Offset purchase

Carbon offsets are purchases made by a company to help reach their goals for Carbon Neutral. There are various providers of carbon offsets to purchase these credits from. Avetta has partnered with Cloverly who is a leading marketplace for high quality offsets. https://info.cloverly.com/cloverly-avetta-partnership (English language only; translate Cloverly projects to your preferred language using free solutions such as Google Translate, Baidu Translate, and others) Below, you will be able to report those carbon offsets for the prior calendar year to help in your reporting and progress towards carbon neutral.
